title: Execute the Python wrapper spike per PLAN-python-spike.md
description: Build the spike wrapper, port hello_python, create hello_ruby twin, deploy to dev, run validation checklist, produce SPIKE-FINDINGS-python-runtime.md. See PLAN-python-spike.md for the validation checklist and abort criteria.
notes: Scope decision (2026-05-17, user-confirmed): human-driven execution. The spike intentionally writes minimal code line-by-line so the human sees every surprise on AWS contact — AI-drafted scaffolding would hide details a spike is supposed to surface. AI agents should NOT execute this task; on /execute-plan resumption, check whether SPIKE-FINDINGS-python-runtime.md exists, and if so move to post-spike refinement (TaskCreate #3).
close_reason: Superseded by AI-driven derisking: Python + AWS subagent reviews completed 2026-05-17 produced concrete revisions. Real-AWS smoke deferred to deploy step at end of implementation. See PLAN-python-runtime-wrapper.md updates for revisions.

title: Phase 0 spike — Python wrapper end-to-end validation in dev AWS
description: Hand-built minimal Python wrapper + ported hello_python + parallel hello_ruby for byte-equivalence + dev AWS deploy + findings doc. Blocks formalization of all turbofan-ibk.* and turbofan-x2t.* child task expansions. See PLAN-python-spike.md.
close_reason: Spike epic superseded by AI-driven derisking — see turbofan-fpx note.

title: Export TURBOFAN_ALLOCATED_RAM_MB from step.default_ram / sizes to job env
description: Patch the deploy code to set env TURBOFAN_ALLOCATED_RAM_MB per job. Value: step.turbofan.sizes[size][:ram] if sized, else step.turbofan.default_ram (convert GB to MB). Python StepMetrics conditionally emits MemoryUtilization when this env is present.

title: Export TURBOFAN_NVME_MOUNT_PATH from ComputeEnvironment to job env
description: Patch the deploy code (ASL/CFN/Batch job def generator) to set env TURBOFAN_NVME_MOUNT_PATH = ComputeEnvironment::NVME_MOUNT_PATH (or the per-CE value). Python wrapper reads it in _setup_storage instead of hardcoding /mnt/instance-storage.

title: Deploy-side env exports for Python step parity
description: Ruby-side small patches that export per-job env vars consumed by the Python runtime: TURBOFAN_NVME_MOUNT_PATH (storage path), TURBOFAN_ALLOCATED_RAM_MB (for MemoryUtilization metric). No Python code in this epic.

title: Python step generator (turbofan step new --lang python)
description: Extend turbofan step new CLI to accept --lang python flag that generates Python-flavored step scaffolding (worker.rb metadata-only + main.py + Python Dockerfile + requirements.txt). See PLAN-python-step-generator.md for full spec.

title: Python runtime wrapper (turbofan_runtime package)
description: Add a python/turbofan_runtime/ package to this repo that mirrors Turbofan::Runtime::Wrapper so Python step containers get the same runtime contract as Ruby ones (envelope unwrap, schema validation, metrics, lineage, SIGTERM, output serialization). See PLAN-python-runtime-wrapper.md for full spec.

title: Retryable module (transient detection, budget, jitter, telemetry)
description: Port lib/turbofan/retryable.rb to python/turbofan_runtime/retryable.py. Wraps all S3/CloudWatch/SecretsManager calls in InputResolver, OutputSerializer, Payload, Metrics. (Expansion drafted post-spike.)
